description: Style NoteUrban trendy need not always flout the rules. This wallet for women from toniq, balances the fine line between street-side cool and elegance. We recommend debuting this lovely piece with denim and tee staples and with your evening dresses!Product DetailsShiny black wallet with a gold zip closureHas two separators - one is zippedFour card slots and one slip pocket on either side of the walletComes with a removable loop to be worn around the wristMaterial and CarePolyurethaneWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm
